parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  email,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  company,
  message,
  ai_intent,
  ai_urgency,
  ai_budget_signal,
  ai_pain_points,
  ai_technical_complexity,
  qualification_score,
  status,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - created_at)) as days_since_created,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - last_contacted_at)) as days_since_contact
FROM leads
WHERE status IN ('new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'proposal_sent')
  AND qualification_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY qualification_score DESC;

=UPDATE leads SET
  qualification_score = {{ $json.new_score }},
  ai_urgency = '{{ $json.urgency_adjusted }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.lead_id }};
